evals.name: frontend-design-with-path
evals.expected_output: Reads requirement, explores codebase, drafts design, asks for confirmation, creates design.md
assertions: Reads requirement.md from the specified folder
Asks user for feedback on design

evals.name: ask-for-path-if-missing
evals.expected_output: Asks user for task folder path
assertions: Asks user which task they're working on
Waits for user input before proceeding

evals.name: skip-simple-task
evals.expected_output: Informs user that design is not needed for this simple bug fix
assertions: Determines design is NOT needed (bug type, simple)
